2606.13201.title: A Minimal Model of Bounded Trade-Off Screening in Multi-Attribute Choice
2606.13201.paper_summary: Human decision-making often involves choosing between multi-attribute alternatives, yet classical models assume fully compensatory utility aggregation despite evidence that people reject options with poor performance on critical attributes. We propose a bounded trade-off reasoning framework in which decisions are governed by a screening process that evaluates the balance between gains and losses across attributes. The model introduces a trade-off tolerance parameter that controls acceptable imbalance and can vary across contexts. Through simulation, we show that this mechanism produces preference patterns that differ from standard utility-based models and captures context-dependent variation in trade-off behavior. These results establish bounded trade-off screening as a plausible computational mechanism for multi-attribute choice and generate testable predictions for future behavioral studies.
2606.13201.paper_summary_zh: 人類的決策過程通常涉及在多屬性選擇之間進行選擇，然而傳統模型假設完全的補償效用聚合，儘管有證據顯示人們會拒絕在關鍵屬性上表現不佳的選項。<lb/>我們提出了一個有界的權衡推理框架，在這個框架中，決策受到一個篩選過程的支配，該過程評估各屬性之間收益和損失的平衡。<lb/>該模型引入了一個權衡容忍參數，該參數控制可接受的不平衡，並且可以在不同情境中變化。<lb/>通過模擬，我們展示了這一機制產生的偏好模式與標準的基於效用的模型不同，並捕捉到權衡行為的情境依賴變化。<lb/>這些結果確立了有界權衡篩選作為多屬性選擇的一種合理計算機制，並為未來的行為研究生成可測試的預測。
2606.13201.author: Manisha Dubey et.al.
2606.13201.authors: Manisha Dubey, Anirban Sarkar, Subramanian Ramamoorthy
